data.title: Hakimi's market capitalization has rebounded to over $40 million, with the price currently at 0.0448 USDT.
data.description: GMGN data shows that the market capitalization of Hakimi, a BSC ecosystem meme coin, has rebounded above $40 million, with its price currently reported at 0.0448 USDT, a one-hour increase of over 33%. Odaily reminds users that meme coins are subject to significant price fluctuations and advises investors to exercise caution.

data.title: Circle Mints 250 Million USDC on Solana Network
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Whale Alert has reported that Circle minted 250 million USDC on the Solana network at 11:19 AM UTC+8.

data.title: The whale who opened a short position 3 days in advance and made a profit of $200 million is suspected to be Bitforex co-founder Garrett Jin
data.description: Community speculation suggests that the whale who opened a massive short position on Hyperliquid three days in advance, profiting $200 million, is likely Bitforex co-founder Garrett Jin. This is because the whale's address has been previously linked to Garrett Jin. Last month, an address that directly received ETH gas from the whale sent him 40,000 USDT. Garrett Jin is also the largest holder of a bet on Polymarket's "Will Trump pardon CZ in 2025?" Trump's tariff war signals reportedly caused a sharp short-term setback in the crypto market today. However, this Bitcoin OG whale opened a massive short position three days in advance, depositing 3,000 BTC into Hyperliquid on October 7th and going short. He then continued to increase his short position through October 10th, with his BTC short position valued at $752 million and his ETH short position valued at $353 million. Ultimately, the whale's single-day profit on Hyperliquid was approximately $190 million to $200 million. Related reading: "The Whale's Bayonet Fight Behind the Biggest Liquidation Day in Crypto History: Air Force Drinks, Draws Swords, and Departs"

data.title: Suspected Hacker Wallets Sell Ethereum at Significant Loss
data.description: According to PANews, two wallets suspected to be linked to hackers have sold 5,480 ETH following a market downturn, with the total transaction amounting to approximately $20.47 million. These Ethereum tokens were purchased a week earlier at an average price of $3,735 each. The recent sale resulted in an estimated loss of around $3.7 million.

data.title: Arthur Hayes Comments on Altcoin Market Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Arthur Hayes recently shared on social media that rumors suggest the automatic liquidation of cross-margin positions by major centralized exchanges is a primary factor behind the significant decline in altcoin prices during the latest downturn. He congratulated traders who placed buy orders at lower levels, noting that many quality altcoins are unlikely to return to those low prices in the short term.

data.title: A certain address suffered a $3.44 million liquidation of vBNB and vUSDT, and had previously suffered a $13 million phishing loss.
data.description: According to Paidun monitoring, address 0x5636 lost $13 million in assets to a phishing attack on Venus in 2008, which was later recovered by the protocol. Recently, this address experienced a liquidation of $3.44 million in vBNB and vUSDT.

data.title: Two whales lost $23.9 million in cbBTC positions on Aave
data.description: According to Pidun monitoring, as BTC plummeted 8.44%, whale 0xddf7 was liquidated on the Aave protocol, losing $14.4 million worth of cbBTC. Another whale, 0xee7c, was liquidated for $9.5 million worth of cbBTC due to a long position on Aave.

data.title: Tether issued an additional 1 billion USDT, with a total of 11 billion USDT minted in the past 30 days
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, Tether minted an additional 1 billion USDT on Ethereum three hours ago. Over the past 30 days, it has minted 11 billion USDT.

data.title: Ethena founder confronts ZKasino founder: Rumors of a potential bankruptcy are pure rumors, beware of scammers who embezzled $30 million
data.description: Regarding the market rumors about the collapse of Ethena’s delta neutral strategy, Guy Young, founder of Ethena Labs, told the founder of ZKasino, “This is a complete lie. Please be careful listening to someone who embezzled $30 million from investors last year and had his assets seized by law enforcement.”

data.title: Aethir launches $45 million DAT buyback program
data.description: According to a post by official co-founder Mark, Aethir's Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) has been listed on the Nasdaq with POAI, and has now officially launched a 45-day, $45 million ATH open market repurchase program.

data.title: A trader shorting ETH lost $10 million in profits, but ultimately still made $12.66 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a trader experienced significant volatility while operating an ETH short position, ultimately earning a profit of $12.66 million. The trader opened a short position at $4,718 on September 13th and held onto a $9.75 million profit when the price dropped to $3,815 at the end of September. Subsequently, in October, the price of ETH rebounded to around $4,700, resulting in a complete loss of the profit, but a subsequent downtrend returned the trader to a profit of $12.66 million.

data.title: Zerobase founder: $30 million in flash withdrawal quota has been increased
data.description: Zerobase founder Mirror Tang posted on the X platform that the flash withdrawal limit has been increased by $30 million.

data.title: Binance USDT spot briefly rose to $1.02, but has now fallen back to $1.0016
data.description: Market data shows that USDT briefly rose to $1.02, possibly due to market fluctuations, and has now fallen back to $1.0016.

data.title: Chainlink’s non-circulating supply wallet unlocks 18.75 million LINK and deposits them on Binance
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Chainlink's non-circulating supply wallet was unlocked again after 4 months and 18.75 million LINK (about US$3.87 million) was deposited into Binance.

data.title: Zerobase founder: Immediately add funds to the liquidity pool and users can withdraw them instantly
data.description: Zerobase founder Mirror Tang posted on the X platform, "Users who need to withdraw funds quickly can do so, and the pool will be immediately replenished."

data.title: Whale '7 Siblings' Acquires ETH Amid Market Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain data analyst Yu Jin has observed that the whale or institution known as '7 Siblings' has resumed purchasing Ethereum (ETH) following a significant market drop. The entity borrowed 40 million USDC from Aave and has already spent 5 million USDC to acquire 1,326 ETH at a price of $3,771 within the past hour.

This whale or institution has a history of buying ETH during market downturns and has profited considerably from these transactions. On August 5th of last year, when ETH fell by 15%, '7 Siblings' purchased 100,000 ETH at approximately $2,270 each. Similarly, on April 7th of this year, they acquired 25,000 ETH at around $1,700 each following a 10% decline in ETH's value.

data.title: Aster: Completed the repurchase of 100 million ASTER tokens
data.description: Aster officially announced on the X platform that it has completed a buyback round of 100 million ASTER tokens. All purchased tokens are stored at the following address: 0x02DCd5b2DdE0F6edb4B797DA468fBc52F23f49Dc.

data.title: Yi Lihua: Don’t buy the dip yet, wait patiently for the situation to become clear
data.description: Yi Lihua posted on X that he has not yet bought the bottom and will wait patiently for the situation to become clear. The decline is far greater than expected.

data.title: The Proliferation of Privacy on Ethereum
data.description:
The Kohaku project is kicking off Ethereum's "privacy by default" era.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/proliferation-of-privacy-on-ethereum

data.title: Binance issued an announcement regarding the depegging of USDE, BNSOL, and BETH, and is conducting a comprehensive investigation into affected users and details.
data.description: Binance has officially released an announcement providing users with an update on the recent price decoupling issues involving USDE, BNSOL, and WBETH tokens. This incident resulted in forced liquidation of some users' positions. Our team is currently conducting a comprehensive review of affected users, the liquidation details, and the subsequent compensation plan. We are also strengthening our risk management mechanisms to reduce the likelihood of similar incidents recurring.
